programme.title: How to Talk to Girls at Parties
How to Talk to Girls at Parties
Warrior
programme.sub-title: Exactly The Wrong Time To Get Proud
programme.desc: Struggling under the pressure of an increased police presence, the Hop Wei search for a new, lucrative way to survive.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.sub-title: Anything Short Of A Blow To The Head
programme.desc: As Ah Sahm and Young Jun struggle to produce authentic bills, they get valuable printing advice from an unexpected source.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.desc: Shaken by the loss of Nellie's land, Ah Toy grapples with a difficult choice. While Mai Ling strikes a business deal with Eliza, an intrusive encounter echoes Li Yong's fears.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.sub-title: Whiskey And Sticky And All The Rest Can Wait
programme.desc: As Sahm and Hong race against time to rescue Young Jun, Mai Ling hits rock bottom as Kong Pak suggests change may be due for the Long Zii.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.sub-title: A Soft Heart Won't Do You No Favours
programme.desc: Desperate to generate money for the Hop Wei, Father Jun sets up a tense deal with German traders as Chao and Lee band together after an unexpected toss up threatens their lives.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.sub-title: Gotta Be Crooked To Get Along In A Crooked World
programme.desc: After Father Jun's injury, Young Jun steps up for the Hop Wei. Ah Sahm grapples with revelations from Yan Mi and Mai Ling.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.sub-title: You Know When You're Losing The Fight
programme.desc: The Hop Wei and Long Zii unite for Mai Ling's wedding. Li Yong receives a grim warning from Kong Pak, Mosley and Lee inch closer to the truth. Bill makes a return to the police force.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.sub-title: All Of Death Is A Going Home
programme.desc: Ah Sahm makes a bold sacrifice to protect Yan Mi, Mai Ling reckons with the consequences of her actions, and Leary reaches his breaking point.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: After a severe accident, Cliff Steele wakes up, a changed man, in the house of Dr Niles Caulder and his Doom Patrol.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: The Chief has disappeared and the only clue that the team have to his whereabouts is an average donkey.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Danny the Street is being hunted by the secret Bureau of Normalcy and needs help from Niles - but gets Vic and Larry instead.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: After a severe accident, Cliff Steele wakes up, a changed man, in the house of Dr Niles Caulder and his Doom Patrol.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: The Chief has disappeared and the only clue that the team have to his whereabouts is an average donkey.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: The group heads for Paraguay by bus to follow up a lead on the donkey. Flit teleports Larry and Cliff there and they meet the man responsible for Morden's transformation into Mr Nobody.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Mr Nobody decides to interfere with the Decreator's prophecy with the help of Niles Caulder.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Cliff and Victor come to an agreement; Jane, Rita, and Larry go in search of a mysterious team called the Doom Patrol.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: After a violent outburst from Cliff, the team engages in some self-led group therapy, leading to some growth within the group as they are knit closer together.

programme.title: The W Awards
programme.desc: It's time to celebrate the best of the best in the AFLW, as we award the Rising Star, All Australian Team, and Best & Fairest Player of 2025.

programme.title: AFL: Sydney v Port Adelaide
programme.desc: After an emphatic Gather Round win, the Power head to Sydney to face the Swans.

programme.title: The W Awards
programme.desc: It's time to celebrate the best of the best in the AFLW, as we award the Rising Star, All Australian Team, and Best & Fairest Player of 2025.

programme.title: AFLW Grand Final Glory: 2018 GF WB v BRI
AFLW Grand Final Glory: 19 GF ADE v CAR
programme.desc: Grand finals are where the glory lies. In the lead up to this year's AFLW Grand Final, take a look back at previous years deciders.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 1999 R16 WC v FRE
programme.desc: The 90s the decade that delivered. There would be three new teams, for the first time non-Victorian clubs would take premiership honours and it was a decade of goalkicking maestros Jason Dunstall, Gary Ablett and Tony Lockett.

programme.title: The W Awards
programme.desc: It's time to celebrate the best of the best in the AFLW, as we award the Rising Star, All Australian Team, and Best & Fairest Player of 2025.

programme.desc: The legendary 2006-2007 Ashes series. Led by Ricky Ponting, the team showcased a brilliant all-round performance, with notable contributions from Shane Warne and Glenn McGrath in their final series.

programme.desc: An inside look at the Fox Cricket commentary team during the first Ashes Test from Perth.

programme.title: The Fox Box: First Ashes Test
The Ashes Mini: 1st Test Day 1
programme.desc: Day one of an Ashes series ... it doesn't get any better. Steve Smith vs Joe Root, two Aussie debutants and a bit of Bazball to get things going.

programme.title: 2021: Australian PGA Championship Men's
programme.desc: Australian Jed Morgan created history when he won in 2021. Not only did he break the championship's biggest winning margin - previously eight shots held by Greg Norman, he also was the youngest winner of the tournamwent in 60 years.

programme.title: 2022: Australian PGA Championship Men's
programme.desc: Cameron Smith became a three-time Australian PGA Champion in 2022, taking the event by three shots. Despite a few nervous moments in the final round, in true champion style Smith regrouped to reclaim and hold onto the lead.

programme.title: 2023: Australian PGA Championship Men's
programme.desc: Min Woo Lee celebrated his first Australian PGA Championship title in 2023. A chin-in eagle on the ninth hole set up his runaway victory and brought the crowd alive.

programme.title: 2002: Australia PGA Championship
programme.desc: Peter Lonard and Jarrod Moseley were tied after 72 holes and after playing one hole of a sudden-death playoff, fading light meant that no further play was possible. They chose to share the title and not return the following day.

programme.title: 2003: PGA Championship
programme.desc: Veteran Peter Senior bogeyed the final two holes but held on to win the Australian PGA tournament for a second time by one shot at Coolum on Queensland's Sunshine Coast.

programme.title: 2004: Australia PGA Championship
programme.desc: Peter Lonard shot a 7-under-par final round of 65 to take out the Australian PGA Championship at Coolum on Queensland's Sunshine Coast.

programme.title: 2014: Australian PGA Championship Men's
programme.desc: Held at Royal Pines Resort, Greg Chalmers triumphed in a thrilling finish. Tied with defending champion and fellow Aussie Adam Scott, they faced a sudden-death playoff. Chalmers secured victory with a birdie on the first extra hole.

programme.title: 2018: Australian PGA Championship Men's
programme.desc: In 2018, The Australian PGA Champion was Cameron Smith, who successfully defended his 2017 title with a two-shot win.

programme.title: 2019: Australian PGA Championship Men's
programme.desc: Adam Scott claimed victory in 2019 over New Zealand's Michael Hendry at Royal Pines Resort. This becomes Scott's first tournament victory in three years and his second Australian PGA Championship title.

programme.title: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: A year after his friend's death, Gabe must return to the dreaded mountain peaks, where he finds himself trapped in a desperate battle against criminals, nature and himself.

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: With his CIA days behind him, Jack Ryan is on vacation when he foils an assassination attempt on the royal family. An enraged IRA splinter faction targets him and his family in revenge.

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: With his CIA days behind him, Jack Ryan is on vacation when he foils an assassination attempt on the royal family. An enraged IRA splinter faction targets him and his family in revenge.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: When the sons of a cavalry colonel set out to fight a war in Europe, suspicion and jealousy threaten to tear apart their once indestructible bond when the sexy Susanna enters their lives.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: When the sons of a cavalry colonel set out to fight a war in Europe, suspicion and jealousy threaten to tear apart their once indestructible bond when the sexy Susanna enters their lives.

programme.title: Meatballs
programme.desc: The wackiest head counsellor in North Star camp history, Tripper Harrison devotes his summer activities to cracking jokes, chasing female staffers, and plotting the demise of their rivals.

programme.title: Meatballs
programme.desc: The wackiest head counsellor in North Star camp history, Tripper Harrison devotes his summer activities to cracking jokes, chasing female staffers, and plotting the demise of their rivals.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: A trio of university parapsychologists decide to open their own business called Ghostbusters, and almost at once are summoned to investigate the strange happenings in a Central Park West apartment.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: A trio of university parapsychologists decide to open their own business called Ghostbusters, and almost at once are summoned to investigate the strange happenings in a Central Park West apartment.

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: After going out of business, the Ghostbusters reunite to save New York City from a supernatural, slimy doom.

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: After going out of business, the Ghostbusters reunite to save New York City from a supernatural, slimy doom.

programme.title: Sixteen Candles
programme.desc: Samantha's 16th birthday should be perfect and memorable. But her whole family is preoccupied with her sister's wedding and completely forgets Samantha's big day.

programme.title: Foul Play
programme.desc: This bizarre, Hitchcockian comedy sees a kooky divorcee and a bumbling Federal agent take on a posse of Hollywood weirdos planning to assassinate the Pope.

programme.title: Foul Play
programme.desc: This bizarre, Hitchcockian comedy sees a kooky divorcee and a bumbling Federal agent take on a posse of Hollywood weirdos planning to assassinate the Pope.

programme.title: Barbarella
programme.desc: In the far future, in a time of way-out, psychedelic spaceships and free love, space agent Barbarella is assigned to stop the evil Durand-Durand and save humanity.

programme.title: Barbarella
programme.desc: In the far future, in a time of way-out, psychedelic spaceships and free love, space agent Barbarella is assigned to stop the evil Durand-Durand and save humanity.

programme.title: Top Secret!
programme.desc: In this rock 'n' roll spy spoof, an Elvis-like pop idol who becomes embroiled in intrigue on a tour of East Germany and falls in love with a French Resistance Fighter.

programme.title: Gogglebox Australia
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers share their thoughts on the week's TV highlights including, Farmhouse Fixer, The Great Cookbook Challenge With Jamie Oliver, I'm A Celebrity... Get Me Out Of Here!, and Dawn of the Dolphins.

programme.title: Gogglebox Australia
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers share their thoughts on the week's TV highlights including, Farmhouse Fixer, The Great Cookbook Challenge With Jamie Oliver, I'm A Celebrity... Get Me Out Of Here!, and Dawn of the Dolphins.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Janet and Phillip complete their tower suite kitchen; Anna and Edward launch French experience weekends; Alison and Zion prepare for their first wedding.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Janet and Phillip complete their tower suite kitchen; Anna and Edward launch French experience weekends; Alison and Zion prepare for their first wedding.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At the castle, Fiona uncovers a Landseer dog portrait cut from a larger work and meets a giant rabbit in the Playful Garden.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At the castle, Fiona uncovers a Landseer dog portrait cut from a larger work and meets a giant rabbit in the Playful Garden.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and experts Richard Madley and Jonathan Pratt are at the Wetherby Racecourse in Yorkshire. Charlie pays a visit to the Royal Armouries in Leeds.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and experts Richard Madley and Jonathan Pratt are at the Wetherby Racecourse in Yorkshire. Charlie pays a visit to the Royal Armouries in Leeds.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: A 67-year-old man has fallen from his horse and been dragged 40m. Meanwhile, a 21-year-old plumber has an infected cyst on her bottom.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: A 67-year-old man has fallen from his horse and been dragged 40m. Meanwhile, a 21-year-old plumber has an infected cyst on her bottom.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Newby Hall in Yorkshire, the team assess treasures including Roald Dahl letters to a school, a Chippendale chair and football memorabilia.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Newby Hall in Yorkshire, the team assess treasures including Roald Dahl letters to a school, a Chippendale chair and football memorabilia.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Two teams go head-to-head in a bid to sell their recently acquired items for a profit at auction.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Two teams go head-to-head in a bid to sell their recently acquired items for a profit at auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.title: Nurses On The Ward
programme.desc: Following the nurses of Queen Alexandra Hospital in Portsmouth as they work across multiple areas of the hospital treating both male and female patients from a range of age groups.

programme.title: Nurses On The Ward
programme.desc: Following the nurses of Queen Alexandra Hospital in Portsmouth as they work across multiple areas of the hospital treating both male and female patients from a range of age groups.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Margherita Taylor is in Somerset with a couple on their maiden house hunt together. They have 550,000 pounds to find a rural home with space to park their beloved caravan.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Margherita Taylor is in Somerset with a couple on their maiden house hunt together. They have 550,000 pounds to find a rural home with space to park their beloved caravan.

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: The sewers celebrate Indian fashion with special guest judge Priya Khanchandani. Challenges include a Nehru jacket, an outfit from Calico and Madras Cotton, and evening wear inspired by the Sari.

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: Kiell Smith-Bynoe returns for Reduce Reuse Recycle week. The sewers make quilted bags from scraps, create new items from textile waste, and repurpose wedding dresses into party outfits.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Frances made a rushed decision and bought her four-bedroom house five years ago. Since then she's realised it's way too big, worn-out and that she doesn't like it, so it's finally time for her to move on.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Margie and David are a couple of old, yoga-loving hippies. They've enjoyed their four-bedroom Central Coast home for 16 years and raised three children here, but it's time to downsize.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Denise Nurse helps newlyweds swap London for Surrey life with space for dogs and visits a community farm promoting wellbeing.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Denise Nurse helps newlyweds swap London for Surrey life with space for dogs and visits a community farm promoting wellbeing.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Wollaton Hall is the perfect backdrop for Fiona Bruce as she tries to guess the value of Batman's mask, his utility belt and the Joker's suit, as worn by Jack Nicholson.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Wollaton Hall is the perfect backdrop for Fiona Bruce as she tries to guess the value of Batman's mask, his utility belt and the Joker's suit, as worn by Jack Nicholson.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Charlie Ross hosts from Nottingham Racecourse with Thomas Plant and Nick Hall advising. Charlie also explores gruesome tales at one of Britain's oldest pubs.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Charlie Ross hosts from Nottingham Racecourse with Thomas Plant and Nick Hall advising. Charlie also explores gruesome tales at one of Britain's oldest pubs.

programme.title: Better Homes & Gardens
programme.desc: Vika and Linda Bull have been part of the Australian music scene for over three decades. They've ridden the roller coaster as live musicians, but even a pandemic couldn't dull their joyous outlook on life.

programme.title: Better Homes & Gardens
programme.desc: Vika and Linda Bull have been part of the Australian music scene for over three decades. They've ridden the roller coaster as live musicians, but even a pandemic couldn't dull their joyous outlook on life.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Janet and Phillip complete their tower suite kitchen; Anna and Edward launch French experience weekends; Alison and Zion prepare for their first wedding.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: On the wedding day at Chateau de la Boutiniere, Alison and Zion have plenty left to do; Jon and Carmen are creating a downstairs bathroom from scratch.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: We revisit Indu and Jason two years on to see if they found a home with potential for them and their two children. Later, we see if fashion designer Shane is fulfilling his coastal dreams.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: We revisit Indu and Jason two years on to see if they found a home with potential for them and their two children. Later, we see if fashion designer Shane is fulfilling his coastal dreams.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Margie and David are a couple of old, yoga-loving hippies. They've enjoyed their four-bedroom Central Coast home for 16 years and raised three children here, but it's time to downsize.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Margie and David are a couple of old, yoga-loving hippies. They've enjoyed their four-bedroom Central Coast home for 16 years and raised three children here, but it's time to downsize.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Denise Nurse helps newlyweds swap London for Surrey life with space for dogs and visits a community farm promoting wellbeing.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: A couple from Edinburgh needs more space for books and rocks, so they seek Alistair Appleton's help to relocate to Northumberland. Alistair meets a couple running yoga classes after escaping Newcastle.

programme.title: Inside The Four Seasons
programme.desc: Michelin-starred chef Yannick Alleno visits Pavyllon as staff strive for perfection, sealing deals and unveiling the secrets of the hotel's exclusive wine cellar.

programme.title: Inside The Four Seasons
programme.desc: Michelin-starred chef Yannick Alleno visits Pavyllon as staff strive for perfection, sealing deals and unveiling the secrets of the hotel's exclusive wine cellar.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Denise Nurse helps newlyweds swap London for Surrey life with space for dogs and visits a community farm promoting wellbeing.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson helps a young couple buy their first home in Leicestershire and meets a former beautician who became a full-time farmer.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: A 62-year-old woman arrives by air ambulance after being trapped in her car for over an hour. Meanwhile, a 23-year-old man has badly cut his knee after a night out with friends.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: A 62-year-old woman arrives by air ambulance after being trapped in her car for over an hour. Meanwhile, a 23-year-old man has badly cut his knee after a night out with friends.

programme.title: Cape Fear
programme.desc: Fourteen years after being imprisoned, vicious psychopath Max Cady emerges with a single-minded mission: to seek revenge on his attorney Sam Bowden.

programme.title: Twisted Nanny
programme.desc: When single mother Julia realizes night nanny Olivia is turning her children against her, Julia must fight to prove that Olivia is not who she says she is before she gets custody of the kids for good.

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: Suffering from amnesia, Bourne has left his violent past behind and is living a normal life with Marie. His plans for a peaceful life are crushed when he narrowly escapes an assassination attempt.

programme.title: Roboshark
programme.desc: What starts off as a typical day on the streets of Seattle soon becomes a terrifying bloodbath, when a great white shark devours an alien space probe - and Roboshark is born.

programme.title: Great White
programme.desc: A flight to a remote atoll turns into a nightmare for five passengers when their seaplane is destroyed and they're trapped on a raft, 160km from shore, with sharks lurking beneath them.

programme.title: Great White
programme.desc: A flight to a remote atoll turns into a nightmare for five passengers when their seaplane is destroyed and they're trapped on a raft, 160km from shore, with sharks lurking beneath them.

programme.title: Santa Jaws
programme.desc: Trying to survive the family Christmas, Cody makes a wish to be alone, which ends up backfiring when a shark manifests and kills his entire family.

programme.title: Santa Jaws
programme.desc: Trying to survive the family Christmas, Cody makes a wish to be alone, which ends up backfiring when a shark manifests and kills his entire family.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: A young boy who, in writing his yearly note to Santa, mixes up the letters and sends it to Satan instead.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: A young boy who, in writing his yearly note to Santa, mixes up the letters and sends it to Satan instead.

programme.title: A Hollywood Christmas
programme.desc: Jessica, a film-maker who directs Christmas movies, has her life thrown into a real-life Hollywood Christmas drama when a network executive shows up and threatens to halt production on her latest film.

programme.title: The Best Christmas Pageant Ever
programme.desc: Six unruly kids wreak havoc and surprise during the town's annual Christmas performance, leaving no one prepared for the mayhem.

programme.title: Trading Places
programme.desc: A story of a down-and-out con artist who trades lifestyles with a well-to-do investor. Two wealthy power players set the wheels turning with a crazy bet and the comedy gets richer by the minute.

programme.title: Trading Places
programme.desc: A story of a down-and-out con artist who trades lifestyles with a well-to-do investor. Two wealthy power players set the wheels turning with a crazy bet and the comedy gets richer by the minute.

programme.title: Santa's Boots
programme.desc: Forced to take a holiday from her job in Seattle, Holly returns to her hometown, where she reluctantly agrees to become Santa's new elf at her dad's local department store.

programme.title: The Holiday
programme.desc: Iris is in love with a man who is about to marry another woman. Across the globe, Amanda realises that the man she lives with has been unfaithful.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: A young boy who, in writing his yearly note to Santa, mixes up the letters and sends it to Satan instead.

programme.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.title: Rise of the Guardians
programme.desc: When the evil spirit Pitch launches an assault on Earth, the immortal Guardians must join forces for the first time to protect the hopes, beliefs and imagination of children all over the world.

programme.title: Funny Woman
programme.desc: Sophie returns to rehearsals with the boys amidst media gossip. A night out to blow off some steam results in a chance meeting that helps reinvigorate their ideas for the new show.

programme.title: Funny Woman
programme.desc: Sophie returns to rehearsals with the boys amidst media gossip. A night out to blow off some steam results in a chance meeting that helps reinvigorate their ideas for the new show.

programme.title: Rapa
programme.desc: Tomas' condition is deteriorating. Maite investigates the disappearance of a Navy officer.

programme.title: Rapa
programme.desc: Palmira's body is found. Maite's relationship with Tomas starts to conflict with her job.

programme.title: Rapa
programme.desc: Palmira's body is found. Maite's relationship with Tomas starts to conflict with her job.

programme.title: Rapa
programme.desc: In the hunt for Palmira's killer, new information about her final hours comes to light.

programme.title: Rapa
programme.desc: In the hunt for Palmira's killer, new information about her final hours comes to light.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Did the Beach Boys' Dennis Wilson trigger Charlie Manson? Is Post Malone cursed by the worlds most haunted object? Did a failed audition save Faith Hill's life?

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Did the Beach Boys' Dennis Wilson trigger Charlie Manson? Is Post Malone cursed by the worlds most haunted object? Did a failed audition save Faith Hill's life?

programme.title: London Kills
programme.desc: The police question a seemingly unaffected widow about her husband's murder, who then points the finger at her brother-in-law. David tries to convince Mulgrew to reveal what he knows.

programme.title: London Kills
programme.desc: The police question a seemingly unaffected widow about her husband's murder, who then points the finger at her brother-in-law. David tries to convince Mulgrew to reveal what he knows.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: At the A&P Show, the owner of the rides appears to die of fright on the Ghost Train.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: At the A&P Show, the owner of the rides appears to die of fright on the Ghost Train.

programme.title: Funny Woman
programme.desc: Sophie returns to rehearsals with the boys amidst media gossip. A night out to blow off some steam results in a chance meeting that helps reinvigorate their ideas for the new show.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Separated from their children, Maggie, Gabriel, and Rosita track a military convoy to a mysterious destination.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Ezekiel and Negan team up to lead a clandestine labour revolt against the warden. Aaron, Jerry, Lydia, and Elijah catch up with Luke and Jules, fleeing Oceanside.

programme.title: The Death of Bunny Munro
programme.desc: A look at the life of a sex-addict traveling salesman who uses his door-to-door beauty products to meet women.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: Armed with the knowledge of his wayward client's identity, the Jackal tracks him down in Munich, determined to settle the score.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: Armed with the knowledge of his wayward client's identity, the Jackal tracks him down in Munich, determined to settle the score.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: At the A&P Show, the owner of the rides appears to die of fright on the Ghost Train.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: At the A&P Show, the owner of the rides appears to die of fright on the Ghost Train.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Separated from their children, Maggie, Gabriel, and Rosita track a military convoy to a mysterious destination.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Ezekiel and Negan team up to lead a clandestine labour revolt against the warden. Aaron, Jerry, Lydia, and Elijah catch up with Luke and Jules, fleeing Oceanside.

programme.title: The Death of Bunny Munro
programme.desc: A look at the life of a sex-addict traveling salesman who uses his door-to-door beauty products to meet women.

programme.title: The Death of Bunny Munro
programme.desc: A look at the life of a sex-addict traveling salesman who uses his door-to-door beauty products to meet women.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: Armed with the knowledge of his wayward client's identity, the Jackal tracks him down in Munich, determined to settle the score.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: Armed with the knowledge of his wayward client's identity, the Jackal tracks him down in Munich, determined to settle the score.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Carol rush Judith to the hospital. Rosita, Eugene, and Gabriel search for Coco. Maggie and Negan take arms against Pamela. The heroes assemble for one last stand.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Carol rush Judith to the hospital. Rosita, Eugene, and Gabriel search for Coco. Maggie and Negan take arms against Pamela. The heroes assemble for one last stand.

programme.title: The Big C
programme.desc: While recovering from brain surgery, Cathy struggles with the demands of her teaching job as she plans to celebrate Adam's 16th birthday.

programme.title: The Big C
programme.desc: While recovering from brain surgery, Cathy struggles with the demands of her teaching job as she plans to celebrate Adam's 16th birthday.

programme.title: The Big C
programme.desc: While recovering from brain surgery, Cathy struggles with the demands of her teaching job as she plans to celebrate Adam's 16th birthday.

programme.title: The Last Anniversary
programme.desc: As the truth behind Jack is revealed and the Last Anniversary Party kicks off, more secrets are unearthed on Scribbly Gum Island.

programme.title: London Kills
programme.desc: The police question a seemingly unaffected widow about her husband's murder, who then points the finger at her brother-in-law. David tries to convince Mulgrew to reveal what he knows.

programme.title: Mr. Mercedes
programme.desc: Alma gives Pete a scare and instructs Morris to do the same. Pete revisits the local bookstore. Hodges and Jerome fear for Holly ahead of her taking the stand.

programme.title: Mr. Mercedes
programme.desc: Alma gives Pete a scare and instructs Morris to do the same. Pete revisits the local bookstore. Hodges and Jerome fear for Holly ahead of her taking the stand.

programme.title: Shirley Valentine
programme.desc: Bored Shirley takes a chance on adventure and a vacation to Greece. She's soon back to her rebellious roots, saying yes to a fling with a handsome rogue and the life she's always wanted.

programme.title: Shirley Valentine
programme.desc: Bored Shirley takes a chance on adventure and a vacation to Greece. She's soon back to her rebellious roots, saying yes to a fling with a handsome rogue and the life she's always wanted.

programme.title: Wicked
programme.desc: In Oz, two clashing witches, Elphaba and Glinda, form an unlikely friendship. Elphaba, wrongly labeled wicked, seeks to expose the corrupt Wizard ruling the land.

programme.title: Wicked
programme.desc: In Oz, two clashing witches, Elphaba and Glinda, form an unlikely friendship. Elphaba, wrongly labeled wicked, seeks to expose the corrupt Wizard ruling the land.

programme.title: Georgia Rule
programme.desc: In this heart-warming story, Georgia is a woman who lives by her own rules and she expects her rebellious granddaughter, to do the same - no is not an option.

programme.title: Georgia Rule
programme.desc: In this heart-warming story, Georgia is a woman who lives by her own rules and she expects her rebellious granddaughter, to do the same - no is not an option.

programme.title: The Change-Up
programme.desc: In this switching places comedy, two best friends wake up in each other's bodies after a drunken night, and become very alarmed with the outcome.

programme.title: Ladies in Black
programme.desc: Adapted from the novel by Madeleine St John, this is an alluring and tender-hearted comedy drama about the lives of a group of department store employees in 1959 Sydney.

programme.title: Ladies in Black
programme.desc: Adapted from the novel by Madeleine St John, this is an alluring and tender-hearted comedy drama about the lives of a group of department store employees in 1959 Sydney.

programme.title: The Dressmaker
programme.desc: With her glamorous style and sewing machine in tow, a woman returns to her remote home town to set things right, but finds her talent by transforming the women she left behind.

programme.title: Downton Abbey: A New Era
programme.desc: The Crawley family goes on a grand journey to the South of France to uncover the mystery of the dowager countess's newly inherited villa.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: Buster Moon is a dapper koala who presides over a once grand theatre that has fallen on hard times. Buster is an eternal optimist, and maybe a bit of a scoundrel, who loves his theatre above all and will do anything to preserve it. Now facing the crumbling of his life's ambition, he has one final chance to restore his fading jewel to its former glory by producing the world's greatest singing competition.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: Buster Moon is a dapper koala who presides over a once grand theatre that has fallen on hard times. Buster is an eternal optimist, and maybe a bit of a scoundrel, who loves his theatre above all and will do anything to preserve it. Now facing the crumbling of his life's ambition, he has one final chance to restore his fading jewel to its former glory by producing the world's greatest singing competition.

programme.title: Grand-Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: When Frank Collins suffers from writer's block, he decides to start a day care for his father-in-law and other seniors as a way to make quick cash.

programme.title: Grand-Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: When Frank Collins (Reno Wilson) suffers from writer's block, he decides to start a day care for his father-in-law (Danny Trejo) and other seniors as a way to make quick cash, while giving him time to still work on his next book. Eventually getting a small group to care for, Frank soon learns that these are not your typical seniors and they can't easily be corralled. With a code enforcement officer challenging the legality of his business, and his senior charges getting into all kinds of trouble, Frank's work days become anything but effortless. Featuring an all-star cast of TV's greatest stars, Grand-Daddy Day Care is a hilarious story for the young, and young at heart.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (2010)
programme.desc: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (2010)
programme.desc: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

programme.title: The Pirates Who Don't Do Anything
programme.desc: Those vegie-eating boys are back. Three veggies serve as 'cabin boys' at a pirate-themed dinner theatre, where they long to move from table service to the stage show, but their incompetence, laziness and cowardice get in the way. But when a princess drags them into the 17th century to rescue her brother, who's been kidnapped by a nefarious pirate with designs on her kingdom, they have to overcome their issues and become heroes.

programme.title: The Pirates Who Don't Do Anything
programme.desc: Those vege-eating boys are back! This time they're cabin boys in a pirate theatre and are called upon to put aside their lazy, cowardly ways and help a princess rescue her brother who's been kidnapped.

programme.title: Spirit Untamed
programme.desc: The next chapter in this beloved franchise begins as a young girl finds a connection to her mother's legacy as a trick rider and forms a bond with a wild mustang named Spirit.

programme.title: Spirit Untamed
programme.desc: The next chapter in this beloved franchise begins as a young girl finds a connection to her mother's legacy as a trick rider and forms a bond with a wild mustang named Spirit.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: An experiment with dinosaurs created from DNA becomes a disaster when sabotage sets the prehistoric monsters loose in an island theme park.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Eccentric scientist John Hammond plans to open a theme park consisting of live dinosaurs, genetically engineered from DNA. Archaeologists Alan Grant and Ellie Sattler are invited to view the park, only to find themselves being hunted when the dinosaurs break free.

programme.title: The Garfield Movie
programme.desc: Garfield, the Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, is about to have a wild outdoor adventure.

programme.title: The Garfield Movie
programme.desc: Garfield, the Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, is about to have a wild outdoor adventure.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Now happily settled with the Brown family, Paddington picks up a series of odd jobs to buy the perfect present for his Aunt Lucy's 100th birthday, only for the gift to be stolen.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Now happily settled with the Brown family, Paddington picks up a series of odd jobs to buy the perfect present for his Aunt Lucy's 100th birthday, only for the gift to be stolen.

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep Movie: Farmageddon
programme.desc: When an alien with amazing powers crash-lands near Mossy Bottom Farm, Shaun the Sheep goes on a mission to shepherd the intergalactic visitor home before a sinister organisation can capture her.

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep Movie: Farmageddon
programme.desc: When an alien with amazing powers crash-lands near Mossy Bottom Farm, Shaun the Sheep goes on a mission to shepherd the intergalactic visitor home before a sinister organisation can capture her.

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: As kids in the 1980s, Sam Brenner, Will Cooper, Ludlow Lamonsoff, and Eddie 'The Fire Blaster' Plant saved the world thousands of times - at 25 cents a game in the video arcades. Now, they're going to have to do it for real. When intergalactic aliens discover video feeds of classic arcade games and misinterpret them as a declaration of war, they attack the Earth, using the video games as the models for their assaults, and now, US President Cooper must call on his old-school arcade friends to save the world from being destroyed by PAC-MAN, Donkey Kong, Galaga, Centipede, and Space Invaders. Joining them is Lt Col Violet Van Patten, a specialist supplying the arcaders with unique weapons to fight the aliens.

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: As kids in the 1980s, Sam Brenner, Will Cooper, Ludlow Lamonsoff, and Eddie 'The Fire Blaster' Plant saved the world thousands of times - at 25 cents a game in the video arcades. Now, they're going to have to do it for real. When intergalactic aliens discover video feeds of classic arcade games and misinterpret them as a declaration of war, they attack the Earth, using the video games as the models for their assaults, and now, US President Cooper must call on his old-school arcade friends to save the world from being destroyed by PAC-MAN, Donkey Kong, Galaga, Centipede, and Space Invaders. Joining them is Lt Col Violet Van Patten, a specialist supplying the arcaders with unique weapons to fight the aliens.

programme.title: Bookworm
programme.desc: Mildred's world is turned upside down when her estranged father, comes to look after her and agrees to take her camping to find the mythological beast, the Canterbury Panther.

programme.title: Bookworm
programme.desc: 11-year-old Mildred's world is turned upside down when her estranged father, the washed-up magician Strawn Wise, comes to look after her and agrees to take her camping to find a mythological beast known as the Canterbury Panther.

programme.title: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Gloria and Melman are still fighting to get home to their beloved Big Apple. Their journey takes them through Europe where they find the perfect cover, a travelling circus.

programme.title: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Gloria and Melman are still fighting to get home to their beloved Big Apple. Their journey takes them through Europe where they find the perfect cover, a travelling circus.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Welcome to the Hotel Transylvania. Dracula, who runs a five-stake resort away from the human world, goes into overprotective mode when a boy discovers the resort and falls for the count's daughter.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Welcome to the Hotel Transylvania. Dracula, who runs a five-stake resort away from the human world, goes into overprotective mode when a boy discovers the resort and falls for the count's daughter.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Spider-Man's greatest battle begins when an evil corporation attempts world domination by deploying an army of super villains to crush Peter Parker.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Spider-Man's greatest battle begins when an evil corporation attempts world domination by deploying an army of super villains to crush Peter Parker.

programme.title: Funny Birds
programme.desc: College student Charlie returns to her family farm to help her mother. Their lives differ, and when Charlie's French grandmother arrives, old wounds resurface.

programme.title: Greedy People
programme.desc: Residents of a small island town navigate a murder and the discovery of a million dollars, a series of increasingly bad decisions upend the once peaceful community.

programme.title: Thelma
programme.desc: When 93-year-old Thelma Post gets duped by a phone scammer pretending to be her grandson, she sets out on a treacherous quest across the city to reclaim what was taken from her.

programme.title: Good Luck To You, Leo Grande
programme.desc: Retired teacher, Nancy, embarks on a post-marital sexual awakening with sex worker, Leo who draws on all his skills and charm, and together they find a surprising human connection.

programme.title: The War With Grandpa
programme.desc: When grandfather Ed moves in, Peter is forced to give up his bedroom. Unwilling to tolerate this injustice, Peter devises a series of pranks to drive him out.

programme.title: Forgetting Sarah Marshall
programme.desc: A struggling musician escapes to Hawaii on a vacation after he is jilted by his television star girlfriend Sarah for another guy, only to find his ex staying in the same hotel with her new man.

programme.title: I Now Pronounce You Chuck & Larry
programme.desc: Two firefighters become domestic partners and must carry the masquerade to extremes when an overzealous bureaucrat becomes suspicious of their true relationship.

programme.title: I Now Pronounce You Chuck & Larry
programme.desc: Two firefighters become domestic partners and must carry the masquerade to extremes when an overzealous bureaucrat becomes suspicious of their true relationship.

programme.title: Joe Dirt
programme.desc: Left by his parents as a child, Joe Dirt had to raise himself. When he goes on a radio show and tells his story, it grabs the attention of the audience who try to help him find his family.

programme.title: Fat Pizza vs Housos
programme.desc: When a pizza chef is released from prison after 15 years, the only shop he can afford is in a housing commission suburb. Cult TV classics collide in this riotous tale.

programme.title: The Dilemma
programme.desc: A man finds out that his best friend and business partner's wife may be cheating, plunging him into the moral dilemma of deciding whether to tell his friend. Comic mayhem ensues.

programme.title: The Dilemma
programme.desc: A man finds out that his best friend and business partner's wife may be cheating, plunging him into the moral dilemma of deciding whether to tell his friend. Comic mayhem ensues.

programme.title: Tag
programme.desc: Based on a true story. For one month every year, five highly competitive friends hit the ground running in a no-holds-barred game of tag they've been playing since the first grade.

programme.title: Tag
programme.desc: Based on a true story. For one month every year, five highly competitive friends hit the ground running in a no-holds-barred game of tag they've been playing since the first grade.

programme.title: Shaun of the Dead
programme.desc: An apocalyptic zombie uprising gives Shaun and his mates a night from hell when they meet at the local pub and find themselves fighting off hordes of the brain-hungry undead in this horror comedy.
